name: Sherrod Brown
subject: A moment to reflect
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Happy holidays, Peter. Wherever you're celebrating, I hope the week is filled with joy, relaxation, and love. If you are struggling at this time of year, may the holiday land gently. Connie and I had our family -- including six of our seven grandchildren -- with us at our home in Cleveland. On Sunday, we spent the day decorating gingerbread houses. (Note: Pre-assembled gingerbread houses will more than likely not arrive in the mail assembled.) |
---
Of course, Franklin enjoyed himself, too.
---
As we do every December, we're celebrating and reflecting on the year. I said it from the beginning of 2018: This year was going to be different. And it was.
Together, we decisively won a Senate race in a state Trump carried by nearly double digits. The Campaign for Ohio knocked on more than one million doors. Nationwide, millions of people took action to push for progress. Some had been volunteering for decades. Many got involved for the very first time.
I saw so much activism from people who love their country and are ready to fight to make America a better place. **We have to keep up that energy.**
---
Here's why: Hardworking families are still suffering the consequences of the GOP's tax scam. The Affordable Care Act is on the line, again. The Trump administration refuses to act on climate change. And too many in Washington still don't recognize the dignity of work.
---
Peter, as we celebrate the holidays, there are 800,000 hardworking people who are unsure of when they'll receive their next paycheck. This is ridiculous. While children at the border are still separated from their families over the holidays, Trump is throwing a temper tantrum about the wall. The problem is that every time Trump fails to restrain his worst instincts, families pay the consequences. Americans deserve better.
We need to keep fighting to make this a country where if you work hard, you're able to get ahead -- where you have the healthcare you deserve and the pension you've earned when you retire. I'll keep working until that's the reality. I hope you'll join me.
**Thank you for all you did this year.** I'm excited to keep fighting together in 2019 and beyond.
---
With gratitude -- and wishing you and your loved ones a happy holidays,
Sherrod

|
---

name: Steve Chabot
subject: A Shutdown, Troop Withdrawals, and a Resignation
body:
A Shutdown, Troop Withdrawals, and a Resignation No Images? [Click here](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-jy/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-r/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-y/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-j/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-t/)
### [A Shutdown, Troop Withdrawals, and a Resignation](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-i/)
First of all, I hope you and your loved ones had a very blessed Christmas. As we should always remember at this time of year, there are those in uniform and otherwise serving our nation in remote areas around the globe, who cannot be with their families, and may God keep them contented and protected until they are back home with their loved ones. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-d/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-h/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Another Shutdown?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-u/)
Is the government really going to shut down in a couple days? And if so who's to blame? And will Social Security checks still go out? And will our soldiers facing hostile forces like the Taliban in Afghanistan still get paid? And if it snows, will my street still get cleared? WHAT'S GOING TO HAPPEN? [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-o/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-b/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-n/)
### [Google - One Reason Republicans May Have a Harder Time Getting Their Message Out](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-p/)
We had an interesting hearing in the House Judiciary Committee yesterday. The witness at the hearing was the CEO of GOOGLE - one of the most important companies in the world today. The CEO was Sundar Pichai, not necessarily a household name, but a very important mover and shaker nonetheless on the world scene today. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-x/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-m/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-c/)
### [The Return of the Queen](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-q/)
For 60 years, the Delta Queen cruised the rivers of America, giving its passengers a unique experience of what it was like to travel America's waterways back in the 1800's. Then 10 years ago, it all came to a halt, and this beautiful queen was chained to a dock in Chattanooga, Tennessee. How did this happen? [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-a/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-f/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-z/)
### [Confrontation at the Border](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-v/)
Thousands of mostly young males from Honduras, Guatemala, and El Salvador, have joined together in caravans and are trying to get into our country through our southern border. Yes, there are some women and children too, and they are inevitably the ones CNN and others interview, and put in their news coverage of unfolding events. But most of the people coming are young, and male, and without accompanying children. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-e/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-s/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-g/)
### [Judiciary Committee](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-w/)
Well I'm back in Washington, after a month or so being home in Cincinnati, preparing for, and recovering from, the recent election. Again, thank you for having the confidence in me to represent your best interests in the swamp that is Washington nowadays. I'm girding up for battle in what will most certainly be a very different environment - at least in the House. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-yd/) [Donate](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-yh/) [Get a Yard Sign](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-yk/) | [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-yu/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-jl/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttlmdt-kujkulhluu-jr/)

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: The decisions my mom made…
body:
| | Peter, When my mother passed away on the last day of September 1999, I had never felt so alone in my life. For the first time since I showed up on this planet, my only family ties, other than my sister and my wife, were my descendants. When my mother drew her last breath, I became the oldest living link my children had in their bloodlines on my side of the family. Her death had closed the book on an entire generation, and I felt the weight of the legacy I was leaving for the generations after me. Even though we don’t choose how we start life, and most of us don’t choose how we end it, we most certainly choose how we live it. **It is how we live that will determine how people feel as they stand staring at our names chiseled into the gravestones. It is how we live that will affect generations to come and countless people whose names we don’t even know.** My mom’s life certainly shaped mine, and it shaped our entire family: Sarah, David and John Mark and their children. There was no grand moment in my mom’s life that did this. Instead, it was the numerous daily decisions to follow the Lord, serve her family, and impact her community that left our world better than it was when she entered it. She instilled that in me, and I’ve tried my best to do the same with my children. Why do I tell you all this? **Because what we do at My Faith Votes is motivated by the impact we hope to make on the next generations.** Seeing 90-million Christians stand boldly and unabashedly for Biblical truths in the public square sometimes feels impossible, but it is work that is bigger than any one of us and it will outlive all of us. Our work together now to protect and advance principles of freedom will live on long after we’re gone. So don’t be discouraged. When religious liberty is upheld, lives are protected, and God’s design for marriage and families championed – the next generation will reap the blessings. **[If you haven’t finalized your year-end giving plans yet, I want to invite you to be part of the important work at My Faith Votes](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181227apl01nd&n=1).** As a non-profit organization, we need your donations to make it possible for us to reach Christians in 2019 and 2020 to stand boldly for biblical truth. **We have an URGENT need to raise $380,000 before the end of the year.** **[Will you stand with us? Please make your tax-deductible gift today, and every dollar you give will be DOUBLED thanks to a generous matching grant](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181227apl01nd&n=2).** All the work we do in 2019 to engage and mobilize Christians to stand strong in a quickly changing culture is only going to be possible when you, and others like you, join with us. But we must end this year strong and reach our year-end giving goal of $380,000. Your donation, of any amount, $5, $20, or $50 will be an investment in America’s future generations. [](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181227apl01nd&n=3) **United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181227apl01nd&n=4)

| | Peter, Thank you for all you did to support Hoosier Democrats this year. Every door knocked, call made, text sent, and conversation you had contributed to our team reaching an unprecedented amount of voters and making some historic gains in the Indiana General Assembly. Your support helped carry our message of affordable health care, livable wages, strong public schools, safe communities, and fair elections to voters all over the state. Our Party is growing and we're going to keep taking this fight for our democracy to every zip code, every home, and every Hoosier. Thanks again for everything you did - and best wishes for a Happy New Year! Onward, John Zody Chair |

name: Mary Mancini
subject: Here's the plan.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
Dear Peter,

We have a strategic plan for winning in Tennessee, and we are executing it. The key to making the plan work is to make sure we have enough resources to put boots on the ground and utilize the latest technology and tools.

Here’s the plan:

STARTING EARLY: We have to start now to build the infrastructure to make Tennessee a competitive state in 2019 and a presidential battleground state in 2020.

GRASSROOTS ORGANIZING: The Tennessee Democratic Party signed up over 7,000 volunteers across the state to help with door knocking and phone calling in 2018 -- and we need the resources to keep these volunteers engaged for the next two years.

CANDIDATE RECRUITMENT: In 2018, we started much earlier than the cycle prior, and we have a goal of starting even earlier to recruit a candidate in every state house, state senate, and congressional seat in 2020.

We can do this. But only if we have the resources necessary to play the long game.

Please give $25, $50, $100 or more right now to support the plan and help elect more Democrats!

Thank you so much for your support.

Mary

Chairwoman, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Letters from Lordstown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
As we enter the new year I will fight tooth and nail to ensure the families impacted by these closings get the support they deserve and have earned. | |
---
Folks: As we celebrate the holidays and the coming new year, please keep in mind the families affected by the closing of the GM plant in Lordstown. For so many people in the 13th District and across our region, this holiday season was filled with uncertainty. As we enter the new year, I will fight tooth and nail to ensure the families impacted by these closings get the support they deserve and have earned. Earlier this month, a group of students in Lordstown and the surrounding area wrote letters to Mary Barra, the CEO of General Motors. **[CNN wrote about these letters, and I want to share their report with you. I hope you will take the time to read what these young people have to say and share their words with friends and family on social media.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90cd/5486deaa/254ad1ed/dcf4fd6/2529055880/VEsH/ "https://www.cnn.com/2018/12/13/us/lordstown-letters-trnd/index.html")** [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90cd/5486deaa/254ad1ed/dcf4fd6/2529055880/VEsE/ "https://www.cnn.com/2018/12/13/us/lordstown-letters-trnd/index.html") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90cd/5486deaa/254ad1ed/dcf4fd6/2529055880/VEsF/ "https://www.cnn.com/2018/12/13/us/lordstown-letters-trnd/index.html") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90cd/5486deaa/254ad1ed/dcf4fd6/2529055880/VEsC/ "https://www.cnn.com/2018/12/13/us/lordstown-letters-trnd/index.html") [I hope you will share these stories, and join me in the fight for working people across this District, Ohio, and the nation.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90cd/5486deaa/254ad1ed/dcf4fd9/2529055880/VEsD/ "http://www.cnn.com/2018/12/13/us/lordstown-letters-trnd/index.html") In gratitude, \-- Tim [DONATE](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90cd/5486deaa/254ad1ed/dcf4fd8/2529055880/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_dec18?refcode=em20181227_letters_oh")

Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. name: Bernie Sanders
subject: If I run
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
Theirs is the agenda that gave rise to Trump. Ours is the one that will defeat him.
#

Sisters and Brothers -
Let me take this opportunity to wish you a very happy holiday season and a wonderful new year.
Whenever I am asked about running for president in 2020, I answer that if I am the best candidate to beat Donald Trump, then I will probably run. That is the truth.
If that happens, the political, financial and media elite of this country will stop at nothing to defeat us. You know that. We’ve lived through it together once before. Our ideas terrify them. So what they will do is try to divide us up with attacks — some old, some new — and our political opponents will spend obscene sums of money on ads to defeat us.
**I just did not expect the attack ads to begin before I even made a decision. But they have...**
Right now, a group of Wall Street Democrats known as the Third Way is running ads in early primary states — Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina and Nevada — calling me out by name and saying our ideas, like Medicare for all, are a path to defeat in 2020.
They not only want to discourage or defeat a Sanders candidacy, they want to make sure that the progressive agenda is not advanced by anyone. They want us to go back to their failed corporate approach which has led to a massive level of income and wealth inequality, a bloated military budget and a failure to address the crises of climate change, a broken criminal justice system and inhumane immigration policies.
**Last time we ran, we made the financial elite pay a price for their attacks on our progressive agenda. It is just as important we do it again today:**
**[Make a $3 donation to our campaign to help us fight back and send a message that we will NOT let the political and financial elite of this country buy this election and scare candidates from supporting a progressive agenda.](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/7104?refcode=em181227-full&t=25&akid=399%2E150750%2E9ZHgG0)**
Our agenda terrifies the political and financial establishment of this country.
But the truth is, their agenda should terrify all of us.
Our ideas will lift people out of poverty, they will guarantee health care as a right for every man, woman and child, and they will make certain that every person in this country with the ability and the desire can get the education they need, regardless of the income of their family.
Ours is not a radical agenda. It's the agenda the American people want.
Their agenda, paid for by wealthy campaign contributors, has led to record levels of inequality, a health care system that costs more per capita than any other developed nation while leaving millions uninsured and underinsured, and grotesque amounts of student debt that rob many of our young people of their futures.
**Theirs is the agenda that made Donald Trump possible. Ours is the agenda that will defeat him.**
And that’s why it’s so important progressives stand up to their attacks today:
**[Make a $3 donation to our campaign as a way of saying we will NOT let the political and financial elite scare candidates from supporting a progressive agenda. Make them pay a price for their attacks.](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/7104?refcode=em181227-full&t=26&akid=399%2E150750%2E9ZHgG0)**
In 2016 we faced the kitchen sink. If we run again, you should expect no less. But the political revolution is stronger and larger than ever, and they will be no match for us if we’re in this fight together.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
[DONATE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/7104?refcode=em181227-full&t=27&akid=399%2E150750%2E9ZHgG0)
Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, [click here to unsubscribe](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=399%2E150750%2E9ZHgG0). To support Bernie with a contribution, [click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=29&akid=399%2E150750%2E9ZHgG0).

Friend,
